Falling Fruit record for Common grape.
Growing on a chain link fence in giant unpicked clusters. Mid/late September. Right on sidewalk. Nobody cares Access: Private but overhanging.

West Stadium Park, 1650 Jefferson Ave, Ogden, UT 84404, USA

Some kind of wild plum tree with small fruit that's yellow with reddish blush when ripe. It's down in a sort of gulley between the river trail and the stream. Hard to forage from, as it overhangs the stream. The fruit often has worms. Delicious if you want to
